# Insurance

```{r}
#| label: setup-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

```{python}
#| label: setup-py
#| include: false
```

<br>


Insurance is for losses you **can't absorb** on your own. Buy enough to
cover the catastrophic; skip the small policies that turn premiums into a
slow leak.

  - Health
  - Auto
  - Renters / homeowners
  - Term life (when you have dependents)
  - Disability
  - Umbrella
